corrections.text: The article presents the phrase "paves the way for full-size modules that hit 28% efficiency later this year, aimed at the utility-scale market" inside quotation marks as a direct statement by Tandem PV CEO Scott Wharton. In the cited sources (pv magazine India and Perovskite-Info), this wording is the publication's own reported-speech summary ("Company CEO Scott Wharton says the breakthrough paves the way for..."), not a verbatim first-person quotation. The substance accurately reflects what the outlets attribute to Wharton, but the words should be read as the publication's paraphrase rather than a direct quote.
